sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Let me check the current state after 20 more clicks. I need to see if the bar is filling up and if the level completes when it's full.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ('P', 'c'):
        print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']}")

ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print(f"\nTop row: {ascii_lines[0]}")
print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
